ddt:Target.Name: ADAS_ECU_C1AHS_V1_1
ddt:Target.Description:
ECU : ADAS ECU Functions : AD1evo (lat & longi)/AEBS/LSS/ABCI/APA/CASP/OSE Vehicle : [SUV] : HHN, HHC, BCB Supplier : Hitachi PDE ADAS ECU : Guillaume Mahé Authors : Guillaume Mahé (AKKA) Sce 65616
-V1 30/11/2018 initialization of the DDT data base for the ADAS ECU [SUV] For ST2
-V1_1 21/05/2019 update with DiagOnCANFD

Data.Name: SessionName
Data.Comment: Diagnostic session values. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
[0x00] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x01] : Default session
[0x02] : Programming session
[0x03] : Extended diagnostic session
[0x04] : Safety system diagnostic session
[0x05 - 0x3F] : ISO / SAE Reserved
[0x40 - 0x5F] : Vehicle manufacturer specific
[0x60 - 0x7E] : System supplier specific
[0x7F] : ISO / SAE Reserved

Data.Name: applicationSoftwareIdentification
Data.Comment: Software Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application software number(s).

The format of the application software identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierIdentifier
Data.Comment: Name and address information of the supplier.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier name and address information.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: ECUSerialNumber
Data.Comment: ECU serial number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the ECU (server) serial number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerKitAssemblyPartNumber
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM.
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer order number for a kit (assembled parts bought as a whole for production e.g. cockpit), when the spare part number designates only the server (e.g. for aftersales).

The record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: VIN
Data.Comment: Vehicle Identification Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the VIN number.

Record data content and format shall be specified by the vehicle manufacturer.

It shall not be erased when the ECU is reprogrammed.

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used by reading services to reference the vehicle-manufacturer-specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be serverspecific and defined by vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUHardwareNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) hardware number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareNumber
Data.Comment: Software Number (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: exhaustRegulationOrTypeApprovalNumber
Data.Comment: Hardware Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the exhaust regulation or type approval number (valid for those systems which require type approval).

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: systemNameOrEngineType
Data.Comment: System name or engine type
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system name or engine type.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: diagnosticVersion
Data.Comment: VDIAG
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the diagnostic version of the ECU.

It is defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Refer to manufacture ECU designer.

Data.Name: programmingOperationFingerPrint
Data.Comment: Only for programmable ECU
Data.Description:
The value is written by the ECU when executing the SendKey SecurityAccess service

The value can be read in boot loader mode.

Data.Name: systemSupplierECUSoftwareVersionNumber
Data.Comment: Software Version (Supplier)
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the system supplier specific ECU (server) software version number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the system supplier.

Data.Name: XCP_Protocol_Activation
Data.Comment: Activate/deactivate possibility to use xcp protocol

Data.Name: param_veh_gearbox.P_sys_x_GearboxType
Data.Comment: Linked to the LSS model input F_x_GearboxType Gearbox type.

Data.Name: param_veh.P_sys_m_VehicleWidth
Data.Comment: "Vehicle width. See LDW/LKA package. *Refer to sheet ""Nissan parameter"". *Refer to ""FrontCamera_F

Data.Name: param_veh.P_sys_x_FourWheelSteering
Data.Comment: Parameter allowing to enable (1) or deactivate (0) the rear wheel steering frame check.

Data.Name: param_veh.P_sys_x_LeftRightSteeringWheel
Data.Comment: "This parameter indicates if the vehicle is left or right hand side. Linked to ??? Relevant for LSS

Data.Name: Steering_wheel_angle.Steering_wheel_angle
Data.Comment: Steering_wheel_angle value

Data.Name: Supply_voltage.Supply_voltage
Data.Comment: Current value of Supply voltage.

Data.Name: WheelRadius.WheelRadius
Data.Comment: Wheel radius - Old Nissan Value:TBD

Data.Name: VehicleMass.VehicleMass
Data.Comment: Road Load Lookup table - Old Nissan Value:TBD

Data.Name: SystemManagement.HFPBM
Data.Comment: HFP/HFPB management in vehicle -

Data.Name: SystemManagement.EPKBM
Data.Comment: HFPB management in vehicle -

Data.Name: SystemManagement.MPU
Data.Comment: MPU management on Vehicle (Cluster or RLink)

Data.Name: RoutineControlType
Data.Comment: Routine control type - VALUES OTHER THAN 1, 2 & 3 ARE RESERVED AND SHOULD NOT BE USED.

Data.Name: RoutineStatusRecord.RoutineInfo
Data.Comment: Routine information

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.16bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.24bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 24 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemoryAddress.32bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 32 bits memory address

Data.Name: MemorySize.8bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 8 bits length for memory size

Data.Name: MemorySize.16bits
Data.Comment: For ReadMemoryByAddress with 16 bits length for memory size

Data.Name: IOCTL.DataIdentifier
Data.Comment: Data Identifier received in reply to InputOutputControl request

Data.Name: IOCTL.StatusRecord.Parameter
Data.Comment: Input Output control status

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifierList
Data.Comment: Routine identifier - This is an example. See documentation for more information.
Data.Description:
Definition of RoutineControl

Data: RoutineIdentifierList

  Contains the list of all routine identifier that may be used with InputOutputControl service.
 
  Example:
  
    0x4501 - ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave

If some of these routine identifer have parameters, you should defined a data with the same name as the routine identifer followed by a dot and a text

  Example:
 
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Min
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Max
  Data: ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.Freq

Then, you should add theses data in the "Send tab" of the RoutineControl request, after the RoutineIdentifierList data.

Data.Name: RoutineIdentifier
Data.Comment: Routine identifier received in the reply of the RoutineControl request

Data.Name: OutputControlCommand
Data.Comment: Input Output control parameter list

Data.Name: Radnav.Radnav_configuration_status
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the vehicle is fitted with Radio Navigation or Not. Allows to choose betwe

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adj. failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or sys. operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCFormatIdentifier
Data.Comment: DTC format - Renault/Nissan use value 0 (3 bytes DTC)

Data.Name: DTCFaultDetectionCounter
Data.Comment: DTC fault detction counter

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCCount
Data.Comment: DTC count

Data.Name: DID_OEM
Data.Comment: "Identifies if the vehicle is a Renault or a Nissan one. Linked to the LSS model input V_x_OEM_confi

Data.Name: 4WS.4WS_configuration
Data.Comment: "Linked to the LSS model input V_x_RWS_configuration_Status Parameter allowing to enable (1) or deac

Data.Name: Configuration_finished.P_sys_x_SupplierConfigFinished
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if configuration by supplier has been made.

Item.Text: ECU is not configued in supplier plant
ECU is configued in supplier plant

Data.Name: Configuration_finished.P_sys_x_RenaultConfigFinished
Data.Comment: This parameter defines if the ECU is configured or not. By default, this value is equal to 0. This p

Item.Text: ECU is not configured in Renault plant
ECU is configured in Renault plant

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.SONAR
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.IDM
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.FWS
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.FWD
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.ATCU
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.VDC
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.USM
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.RADAR
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.METER
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.IVI
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.HFM
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.FrCamera
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.EPS
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.ECM
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.BCM
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DID_ECU_PRESENT_IN_VEHICLE.ACU
Data.Comment: list to be define with all the LIS

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber_N
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM

Data.Name: Snapshot.Supplier.Supplier_Fault_Code
Data.Comment: Supplier fault code to allow a detailed diagnosis by supplier

Data.Name: Snapshot.Ageing_Counter
Data.Comment: Number of diagnostics cycles (how many times the diagnostics has been done for this DTC). If the num

Data.Name: Snapshot.Vehicle_Speed
Data.Comment: Vehicle's speed when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot.Yaw_Rate
Data.Comment: Yaw rate when the DTC was raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot.Braking_Pressure
Data.Comment: Braking pressure when the DTC was raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot.LDW_LKA_Activation_Status
Data.Comment: LDW / LKA activation status when the DTC was raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot.Overheating_Status
Data.Comment: Overheating status when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot.Overheating_Timer
Data.Comment: Overheating timer when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot.InternalFailure_Status
Data.Comment: Internal Failure status when the DTC has been raised.

Data.Name: Snapshot.DTC_Mileage_First_Occurence
Data.Comment: "See [DRC14] for details. Mileage at the DTC's first occurrence since last clearance."

Data.Name: Snapshot.DTC_Mileage_Last_Occurence
Data.Comment: "See [DRC14] for details. Mileage at the DTC's last occurrence since last clearance."

Data.Name: Snapshot.DTC_Occurence_Counter
Data.Comment: "See [DRC14] for details. Counts the occurrence of the DTC since last clearance."

Data.Name: Snapshot.DTC_failure_Duration
Data.Comment: give the duration of the DTC staying at present state

Data.Name: Snapshot.Vehicle_Warning_State
Data.Comment: Vehicle's state when the DTC has been raised.

Item.Text: "SERV" and "STOP" are ON (alert type R3& D3)

Data.Name: Snapshot.Vehicle_Driving_Status
Data.Comment: Vehicle's state when the DTC has been raised.

Item.Text: Vehicle driving, without being able to determine direction

Data.Name: PositionCamera.PositionCamera
Data.Comment: Camera position

Data.Name: AD1.SafetyBag
Data.Comment: Safety bag inhibition flag

Data.Name: MAC_error_ECM.bit_status
Data.Comment: Refer to Ref[1] and Ref[2]

Data.Name: MAC_error_ECM.Full_ARC
Data.Comment: Full_ARC when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_ECM.Synch_Failure_Counter
Data.Comment: Synchronization Failure Counter when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_AT/CVT/DCT.bit_status
Data.Comment: Refer to Ref[1] and Ref[2]

Data.Name: MAC_error_AT/CVT/DCT.Mileage
Data.Comment: Mileage when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_AT/CVT/DCT.Full_ARC
Data.Comment: Full_ARC when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_AT/CVT/DCT.Synch_Failure_Counter
Data.Comment: Synchronization Failure Counter when error log recorded

Data.Comment: Refer to Ref[1] and Ref[2]

Data.Name: MAC_error_ CDM.Mileage
Data.Comment: Mileage when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_ CDM.Full_ARC
Data.Comment: Full_ARC when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_ CDM.Synch_Failure_Counter
Data.Comment: Synchronization Failure Counter when error log recorded

Data.Comment: Refer to Ref[1] and Ref[2]

Data.Name: MAC_error_ HEVC.Full_ARC
Data.Comment: Full_ARC when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_ HEVC.Synch_Failure_Counter
Data.Comment: Synchronization Failure Counter when error log recorded

Data.Comment: Refer to Ref[1] and Ref[2]

Data.Name: MAC_error_AVM.Full_ARC

Data.Comment: Synchronization Failure Counter when error log recorded

Data.Comment: Refer to Ref[1] and Ref[2]

Data.Comment: Synchronization Failure Counter when error log recorded

Data.Comment: Refer to Ref[1] and Ref[2]

Data.Comment: Mileage when error log recorded

Data.Comment: Full_ARC when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_ ADAS_ITS1.Synch_Failure_Counter
Data.Comment: Synchronization Failure Counter when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_ECM.Mileage
Data.Comment: Mileage when error log recorded

Data.Name: AD1.LateralStandAlone
Data.Comment: Lateral control in standalone -

Data.Name: AD1.AlgoFusion
Data.Comment: Selection of the fusion Algo (0 - Nissan / 1- New Renault algo / 2- Algo AS3

Data.Name: AD1_2.EngineType
Data.Comment: Engine type used in the vehicule -

Data.Name: AD1_2.DriveSystemType
Data.Comment: Wheel drive configuration -

Data.Name: AD1_2.BrakeSystem
Data.Comment: Brake System used in the vehicule -

Data.Name: LongiLat.LCAButtonPresent
Data.Comment: LCA hardware button presence 0 = No / 1 = Yes

Data.Name: LongiLat.LateralPresentInVehicle
Data.Comment: Lateral algorithm activation, true if activated -

Data.Name: LongiLat.LongiPresentInVehicle
Data.Comment: Longitudinal algorithm activation, true if activated -

Data.Name: Mode.EcoMode
Data.Comment: Eco mode selection

Data.Name: Mode.RaceMode
Data.Comment: Race mode selection

Data.Name: LSS.MainConfig.ArchitectureType
Data.Comment: Used to choose E/E Architecture

Data.Name: LSS.MainConfig.MasterInhibition
Data.Comment: Used to inhibit all LSS features

Data.Name: LSS.MainConfig.Actuator_Configuration
Data.Comment: Steering or branking or both

Data.Name: LSS.LDW.LDW_SensibilityState
Data.Comment: See LDW/LKA ST package.

Data.Name: LSS_Conf.LKA_configuration_Status
Data.Comment: Parameter flag to enable/disable the LKA function.

Data.Name: LSS_Conf.ELKA_OV_Config
Data.Comment: Activation/Deactivation ELKA_OV

Data.Name: LSS_Conf.ELKA_OC_Config
Data.Comment: Activation/Deactivation ELKA_OC

Data.Name: LSS_Conf.ELKA_RE_Config
Data.Comment: Activation/Deactivation ELKA_RE

Data.Name: LSS_Conf..LDW_configuration_Status
Data.Comment: LDW configuration status

Data.Name: LSS.EPS
Data.Comment: Type of EPS (rack or column)

Data.Name: LSS.ReadMem.LDW_ActivationState_memorized
Data.Comment: LDW_ActivationState read/write from/to memory

Data.Name: LSS.ReadMem.LKA_ActivationState_memorized
Data.Comment: Linked to the model input

Data.Name: LIN_DEV.LIN
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the receiving debug frames for LIN.

Data.Name: DID_Dev.LSS
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the debug frames for LSS features. See LSS STRComp.

Data.Name: CRC_CLK_DEV.CRC_CLK
Data.Comment: Activate/desactivate the CRC and CLK check on frames.

Data.Name: EngineParam.P_tng_x_EngineCoastCorrectionEnable
Data.Comment: Flag coasting strategy activation (0 : Disable strategy, 1 : Enable strategy) - Old Nissan Value:TBD

Data.Name: EngineParam.P_tng_x_GearShiftActivation
Data.Comment: Activate gear shift - Old Nissan Value:TBD

Data.Name: EngineParam.P_tng_x_StopModeSelection
Data.Comment: Stop Mode Selection 0 : Long stop only managed by standstill / 1 : short and long stop managed by st

Data.Name: LSS_Button_param.ButtonVoltage
Data.Comment: Measured Lateral button voltage.

Data.Name: LSS_Button_param.V_x_LD_ButtonCounter
Data.Comment: Number of button press

Data.Name: LSS_Button.Lat_Button_DayIntensity
Data.Comment: Lateral button LED intensity for Day

Data.Name: LSS_Button.Lat_Button_NightIntensity
Data.Comment: Lateral button LED intensity for Night

Data.Name: Flag_AEBManagement.Diag_Disable_AEB
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate all AEB features

Data.Name: Flag_AEB1.Diag_Disable_IU
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB InterUrban features

Data.Name: Flag_AEB1.Diag_Disable_City
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB City features

Data.Name: Flag_AEB1.Diag_Disable_Ped
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB Pedestrian features

Data.Name: Flag_AEB1.Diag_Disable_Cyc
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB Cyclist features

Data.Name: Flag_AEB1.Diag_Disable_JA
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB Junction Assist features

Data.Name: Flag_AEB1.Diag_Disable_LTA
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB Left Turn Assist features

Data.Name: Flag_AEB1.Diag_Disable_TAP
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB Turn Across Path features

Data.Name: Flag_AEB2.Diag_Disable_IU_FixTgt
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB InterUrban activation on fixed target

Data.Name: Flag_AEB2.Diag_Disable_City_FixTgt
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB City activation on fixed target

Data.Name: Flag_AEB2.Diag_Disable_RadarOnly
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB activation with Radar only target detection

Data.Name: Flag_AEB2.Diag_FCW_Only
Data.Comment: to activate/deactivate AEB Forward Collision Warning features

Data.Name: Flag_AEB2.Diag_Enable_IU_RadarOnly
Data.Comment: to enable/disable AEB IU activation on radar only detected moving target

Data.Name: Flag_AEB2.Diag_Disable_Confidence
Data.Comment: to enbable/disable Confidence function

Data.Name: Flag_AEB2.Diag_Disable_Dcontrol
Data.Comment: to enable/disable Distance Control Close Loop Regulation function

Data.Name: Flag_AEB3.Diag_WarnConfTime
Data.Comment: to adjust camera warning confidence timeout

Data.Name: Flag_AEB3.Diag_BrakeConfTime
Data.Comment: to adjust camera braking confidence timeout

Data.Name: Flag_AEB4.Erase_Failure
Data.Comment: to erase all failure from diag // for development

Data.Name: MAC_error_AVM_CH01.Mileage
Data.Comment: Mileage when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_AVM_CH01.Full_ARC
Data.Comment: Full_ARC when error log recorded

Data.Name: MAC_error_AVM_CH01.Synch_Failure_Counter
Data.Comment: Synchronization Failure Counter when error log recorded

Data.Name: ADAS_Switch.P_tng_x_Ad1EvoSwitch
Data.Comment: Select input from Fusion or camera sensor or radar sensors for Ad1Evo swc

Item.Text: Take fusion objects for AD1 Enh input
Take camera objects for AD1 Enh input
Take radar objects for AD1 Enh input

Data.Name: ADAS_Switch.P_tng_x_AEBSwitch
Data.Comment: Select input from Fusion or camera sensor or radar sensors for Aeb swc

Item.Text: Take fusion objects for AEB Enh input
Take camera objects for AEB Enh input
Take radar objects for AEB input

Data.Name: MAC_error_AVM_CH01.bit_status
Data.Comment: Refer to Ref[1] and Ref[2]

Data.Name: CalibrationNumber
Data.Comment: Calibration Number
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer specific ECU application data identification record.

The format of the application data identification structure shall be ECU specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Data.Name: BootVersion
Data.Comment: generic DID

Data.Name: vehicleManufacturerSparePartNumber_R
Data.Comment: Ordered Part Number - This value shall contain the number of the part ordered by OEM
Data.Description:
This value shall be used to reference the vehicle manufacturer spare part number.

Record data content and format shall be server specific and defined by the vehicle manufacturer.

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Programming
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / DDT : Unusable for Clip import

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: RoutineControl
Request.Comment: You should remove ROUTINE_Temperature_Wave.xxx data. These are examples.

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.32x8
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 32 bits and data length coded on 8 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.32x16
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 32 bits and data length coded on 16 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.24x8
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 24 bits and data length coded on 8 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.24x16
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 24 bits and data length coded on 16 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.16x8
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 16 bits and data length coded on 8 bits

Request.Name: ReadMemoryByAddress.16x16
Request.Comment: Read Memory By Address with address coded on 16 bits and data length coded on 16 bits

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory
